title: vendor: update github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl to 1.1.0
body:

comments.body: You may need to retry the vendor, the build is complaining about a potential mismatch in download checksum?

> You may need to retry the vendor, the build is complaining about a potential mismatch in download checksum?

Thanks @mheon! I've updated the pull request.
LGTM. Restarted one job, probably a flake.
